response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software craftsmanship, leadership experience, and infrastructure knowledge across multiple domains, he falls significantly short on the minimum 8 years of C++ experience—showing only 6-12 months of focused C++ work during his National Instruments tenure. His career is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, which doesn't align with the core systems programming expertise needed to lead a cloud compute platform targeting infrastructure and compute technologies.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack development experience with proven ability to architect systems and mentor teams across diverse technical domains
Strong foundation in software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) demonstrated through organizing coding practices and teaching workshops
Hands-on infrastructure experience with microservices, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and distributed systems through roles at Dunnhumby and Optilyz
concerns: Critical gap in minimum C++ requirement: 6-12 months of documented experience versus 8 years required for this mid-senior technical lead role
No master's degree and limited explicit technical leadership experience in cloud or DevOps engineering mentoring contexts
Career trajectory focused on web and application-level systems rather than systems programming, low-level compute architecture, or platform infrastructure

key_factors.factor: Cloud Infrastructure and Distributed Systems Knowledge
